role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund seeks to reflect the price of the Swiss Franc. The sponsor believes that, for many investors, the shares represent a cost-effective investment relative to traditional means of investing in the foreign exchange market.
